observedMutationClass: new repo-local skill entry, skill trigger inventory update, docs lint mutating-skill coverage, and routing reference update
acceptanceEvidenceClass: rules lint and targeted repo-local skill routing review; no gameplay acceptance evidence
rootCause: The successful Garage SetB Stitch-to-UI Toolkit import exposed a repeated execution loop that was split across broad router skills, making it easy to miss source locking, pilot-vs-runtime wording, scoped workflow policy, and visual mismatch closeout.
prevention: Added the focused jg-stitch-unity-import repo-local skill, registered it in the skill trigger inventory, updated the UI reference entrypoint wording, and added it to docs-lint's mutating repo-local skill inspection list.
verification: Run npm run --silent rules:lint with the current changes; confirm the new SKILL.md contains owner routing, Plan Mode inspection/reference wording, explicit mutation prohibition, scoped workflow policy guidance, and pilot/runtime acceptance language.
